mapper.sql: sqai.id, sqai.group_id, sqai.work_card, sqai.employee_name, sqai.operation_code, sqai.error_msg, sqai.data_status, sqai.assessment_quarter, sqai.assessment_num, sqai.se_id, sqai.create_time, sqai.create_by, sqai.update_time, sqai.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.assessment_quarter as ${tAlias}_assessment_quarter, ${tAlias}.assessment_num as ${tAlias}_assessment_num, ${tAlias}.se_id as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into swm_quarterly_assessment_interface (group_id, work_card, employee_name, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, assessment_quarter, assessment_num, se_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{assessmentQuarter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessmentNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_quarterly_assessment_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, assessment_quarter = #{assessmentQuarter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assessment_num = #{assessmentNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, se_id = #{seId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_quarterly_assessment_interface (group_id, work_card, employee_name, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, assessment_quarter, assessment_num, se_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by)
select #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ), #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'U', CASE WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE se.name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN '工号匹配失败' ELSE '' END, CASE WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE se.name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN 'F' ELSE 'T' END, #{assessmentQuarter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assessmentNum,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, isnull((select se.id from swm_employee se WHERE se.name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) AND se.work_flag = 1), -1), getdate(), #{createBy, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}, getdate(), #{updateBy, jdbcType = TIMESTAMP}
